Products

Cross Chain Swap

Privacy Swap

Disperse

Breaks down barriers with interoperability without compromising your privacy

Projects Integrated into the ChainSwap Ecosystem

Embrace interoperability and unlock the full potential of DeFi with ChainSwap's Cross Chain Swap utilizing Chainlink’s CCIP and Circle’s CCTP to trade any token effortlessly between various leading blockchains, all within a single platform.

Unlike traditional swaps that leave visibility to all, ChainSwap utilizes advanced techniques to ensure Privacy and complete anonymity throughout the entire Swap process.

ChainSwap prioritizes user efficiency by incorporating a cutting-edge Dispersion technology built upon next-generation infrastructure, allowing you to distribute tokens to a multitude of wallets with ease.

Ditch the limitations of single-chain DEXs. ChainSwap shatters the walls, allowing you to trade tokens, protocols, and manage liquidity freely across multiple blockchains for unparalleled access and opportunity. 

Multichain Dex

ChainSwap prioritizes user efficiency by incorporating a cutting-edge Dispersion technology built upon next-generation infrastructure, allowing you to distribute tokens to a multitude of wallets with ease.

Ditch the limitations of single-chain DEXs. ChainSwap shatters the walls, allowing you to trade tokens, protocols, and manage liquidity freely across multiple blockchains for unparalleled access and opportunity. 

Multichain Dex

Integrating Chainlink’s Cross Chain Interoperability Protocol - CCIP

ChainSwap unlocks secure and efficient cross-chain swaps through Chainlink's CCIP.
 
This innovative protocol boasts Level 5 Security through its decentralized network with an added “Risk Management Network” allowing for the seamless transfer of both data and tokens between blockchains

Explore CCIP →

Circles Cross Chain Transfer Protocol  - CCTP

This innovative protocol eliminates the need for complex conversions by facilitating direct USDC swaps between supported blockchains. CCTP prioritizes security by utilizing a reliable burn and mint mechanism, mitigating risks associated with traditional bridge hacks.

 

Furthermore, CCTP streamlines transactions, minimizing processing times and fees, allowing users to swap USDC across chains efficiently and cost-effectively

Explore CCTP →
